title: teucrium polium subsp. lutescens
intro: Teucrium polium subsp. lutescens, also known as yellow germander, is a subspecies of the Teucrium polium plant, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Teucrium polium subsp. lutescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
